name: Blog content creator with Sheets tracking and email approval
description: Reads blog topic ideas from Google Sheets, uses Claude AI to research and write SEO-optimized blog posts, saves drafts back to Sheets, and sends an approval request email via Gmail.

source.originalName: Automate blog content creation with OpenAI, Google Sheets & email approval flow

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading topics and saving drafts

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending approval emails

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for researching blog topics

approverEmail.description: Email address of the person who approves blog posts

blogTopic.description: Blog topic or title to write about (e.g. 'How to improve team productivity with AI')

wordCount.description: Target word count for the blog post

steps.name: Build research query from blog topic
Research the blog topic with Exa
Build AI prompt for blog post generation
Run Claude AI to write the blog post
Format blog post data for Sheets tracking
Save blog post tracking data to Sheets
Build approval email with blog draft
